title: stelis cairoensis
intro: Stelis cairoensis, also known as the Egyptian orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Egypt. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Stelis cairoensis include its potential to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Stelis cairoensis typically involve drying the plant material, then using it in teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
